method: load ref iter N ckpt into nano, forward on iter N+1 batch (that ref actually forwarded with those weights), compare to ref's logged single-iter loss

summary.direction: nano SDPA systematically higher than ref TE flash-attn-2
summary.conclusion: Pure forward-kernel-diff alone is 2x larger than mid-training rolling-avg residual (+0.007). Trained weights nearly identical; the residual is fully explained by kernel.
